name: glass-dock
title: Glass Dock
description: A macOS-style liquid-glass application dock built on the refraction engine: a four-item glass bar. A glass lens springs under the highlighted item (hovered or selected), bending the content behind it, while the icons stay crisp on top. The whole dock can be dragged across the content it refracts.
docs: Import { GlassDock } from "@/components/ui/glass-dock". It is a scaffold: pass your screen content as children and the dock overlays it, refracting that content through the bar and the highlight lens. Pass `items` as an array of { id, label, icon, badge? }; control selection with value / defaultValue / onValueChange. A single glass lens springs under whichever item is hovered, falling back to the selected item. Set `draggable` to let the user drag the whole dock across the content behind it. Tune the material with the optional `glass` prop (a LiquidGlassConfig: mode, specular, blur, refraction { amount, thickness }, translucency, shadow); DEFAULT_LIQUID_GLASS is exported.
